name: CONTRACT-BUG-19
title: check-template-schema-producer-consistency.py references nonexistent file-bug.sh producer
description: scripts/enforcement/check-template-schema-producer-consistency.py module docstring describes PRODUCER_FIELDS as fields written by file-bug.sh. file-bug.sh has been replaced by rabbit-file's file-item.py. The PRODUCER_FIELDS set in the script (lines 25-28) is stale relative to the current rabbit-file producer. Either delete this enforcement or update to reference the current producer.

history.note: Fixed Wave 3 batch 2: schema permissiveness, template fields, enforcement script corrections per Inv 22-33.
